description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Persona 5-themed cereal, featuring bold red, black, and white graphics. The front displays the Persona 5 logo, a stylized 'P5', and a large cartoon character with blue eyes and a yellow scarf, set above a bowl of chocolate and white cereal balls. The back of the box showcases additional Persona 5 artwork, including three comic-style panels and another image of the mascot, along with a diamond graphic. One side panel contains a detailed nutrition facts label and ingredients list, while the other side features more Persona 5 branding and a small illustration of a vehicle. The box is glossy and visually striking, with a mix of geometric patterns and character art. The overall appearance is vibrant and designed to appeal to fans of the Persona 5 franchise.
description: A Persona 5-themed cereal box with bold red, black, and white graphics, featuring cartoon character art and a bowl of chocolate and white cereal balls. The packaging is glossy and covered in promotional artwork and branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Persona 5 logo, a large cartoon mascot, and a bowl of cereal balls against a red and black patterned background.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the nutrition facts panel and ingredients list, with minimal artwork and a mostly red background.
description_view_2: The back view features additional Persona 5 artwork, including three comic-style panels, another image of the mascot, and a diamond graphic.
description_view_3: The right side view shows more Persona 5 branding, a small vehicle illustration, and a continuation of the red and black geometric design.
attribute_brand_logo: The Persona 5 logo, a large stylized 'P5' in white and gray, is prominently displayed on the front and back of the box.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box shows a bowl of chocolate and white cereal balls, suggesting a chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the left side of the box.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large cartoon mascot character appears on the front and back, with additional Persona 5 artwork and comic-style panels on the back, serving as promotional graphics.
